entry.title: SuccessFactors Employee Central Certification
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am starting my journey with SuccessFactors, I am using SAP learning for same.I am not associated with any SAP customer or partner. Please help me with below questions.

  1. How can I get system access for practice and How can I enroll for certification?
  2. Is Learning HUB subscription is the only way to get system access and scheduling an exam?
  3. Any other suggestions

Thanks

Jyoti

entry.title: price C_TS4FI_2023
entry.content:
Hi Consultant

What is the cost of the C_TS4FI_2023 certificaton?

regards

Claudio

entry.title: CER006 is not purtchasable
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to by the CER006, but even if I choose a Country as described, it is not possible.


May some one has an idea?

Regards Christof

entry.title: Staying certified without LearningHub subscription?
entry.content:
SAP revamped their certification process about a year ago, introducing the requirement to renew certifications annually through a "Stay Certified" exam. At the time, I understood that once you purchased the certification, these renewal exams would be free.

Now, with the first renewal period approaching, I’ve discovered that you apparently need a Learning Hub subscription to even access the "Stay Certified" exam. Also Learning Hub page says there's another "Partner" version of it, but I cannot access the "Stay Certified" exam through the Partner Edge.

Am I misunderstanding something here, or are these renewal exams not actually free after all?

entry.title: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal ID or Not ?
entry.content:
I add Yahoo Mail (As a Second Mail) with SAP Universal ID.

In this process i received Verification code on Yahoo Mail and put this code and complete the process.

I want to know, How to Verify, Yahoo Mail is Add with SAP Universal ID or Not, because when I repeat this process, SAP Show Notification "E-mail is already part of your SAP Universal ID"

Help me, Because I have to take an Certificate Exam.

entry.title: Is There an SAP S/4HANA Service Certification Available?
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I’ve been searching for an SAP S/4HANA Service certification but haven’t found any information about it being offered by SAP. So far, I’ve only found certifications for SAP Service Cloud and SAP FSM. Does anyone know if SAP plans to introduce an S/4HANA Service certification in the future? If it already exists, could you please share the link to the certification?

Thank you.

entry.title: We are unable to book CER006 EXAM, not showing any booking information or just grade out, Pelase hel
entry.content: We are unable to book CER006 EXAM, not showing any booking information or just grade out, Pelase help.

entry.title: Error trying to activate CERB02 license: partner misconfiguration
entry.content:
Hi,

I tried to activate my CERB02:SAP Global Certification Online Exam for SAP Learning Hub, Solution Editions (2 attempts) license and got the following error

We are unable to process your order at this time. Please contact your local SAP Training and Adoption office and provide error: partner misconfiguration.

I have drafted a support case and it remains In-Process and will not respond. Please advise me what to do.

entry.title: Just wanted to know the examination course fees (6 attempts) for course code T_S4FI via NEFT.
entry.content: Hi Just wanted to know the examination course fees (6 attempts) for course code T_S4FI which will be paid via NEFT

entry.title: Stay certified - Is an SAP Learning Hub subscription required for accessing new learning journeys?
entry.content:
Hi!

I received a notification recently that the C_S4CPB Implementation Consultant—SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition will expire in 8 weeks, and now I am supposed to take the assessment to extend the validity of my certification. However, my SAP Learning Hub subscription has expired, and I only see old learning materials for which I passed the assessment last year (for Cloud version 2402), not the new ones for version 2502. I know that taking the assessment requires an active SAP Learning Hub subscription, but does access to the latest learning journey also require a Learning Hub subscription?

Thanks for any help on this topic.

Mihael

entry.title: C_HAMOD example question
entry.content:
Hi, in the Exam sample questions for C_HAMOD this question is contained with the stated answer:

I dont't see why "only USA" is correct. When we query the sales CV, then the income view and its priviliges shouldn't matter at all. In my opinion, "Europe and USA" should be correct.

Can anybody explain why "only USA" is correct?

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Stay certified without learning hub
entry.content:
Hello,

I received an e-mail that my certification is about to expire and that I can stay certified by subscribing to SAP learning hub. Is there another way of staying certified? E.g. is it possible to pay just for a delta/"stay certified" exam? In my case the certification is C_DBADM.

Kind regard

entry.title: SAP HCM S/4Hana Examination Inquiry
entry.content:
I am trying to access C_THR12_2311 examination for certificate. It's asking me to subscribe for the yearly plan of USD 1,332. 

Is there any cheaper alternative than subscribing for the yearly plan? Thank you.

P.S: I've found two exam chances for $250~ but not available for individuals.

entry.title: How to get started with certification?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

as project leader and manager I want to start with SAP and SAP certification process.

What is the roadmap to get the step into SAP, SAP certification and overview in the S4Hana-Consulting and project management. 

Thank you.

Best regards
Patrick Koglin

entry.title: preparing for certification.
entry.content: Does anyone know good providers of practice questions for current certifications, such as C_S43? The certification can be taken in German. Unfortunately, I can't find any german practice questions for this within the SAP Learning Hub.

entry.title: CABAP_D
entry.content:
I'm about to do the session to obtain the CABAP_D certification and I have a doubt about how errors are counted.

If I am undecided on an answer, will I be penalized if it is incorrect with a negative score or I simply get  zero?

where can I read these details
Thank you
Ines

entry.title: Will there still be an SAP HCM in ECC/S/4HANA certification next release?
entry.content: I wanted to plan my exam and saw that it's getting retired

entry.title: "I am not able to take the 'Stay Certified' assessment.
entry.content:
Hello dear community,

Since the April 1st is coming  I still need to take "Stay certified" assessment to extend my certification validity.

But the site return error: Screens below.

Whenever I clicking Take assessment it gives me, 

I have valid "Learning Hub Subscription".

Could you please help me to solve this problem.

Thank you very much in advance,

entry.title: Request for Assistance Extending SAP Certificate Validity
entry.content:
Dear SAP Certification Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

My SAP certification (linked below) is set to expire on March 31, and I would like to extend its validity. However, the system prompts me to have an Active SAP Learning Subscription (SAP LH). As a freelancer with over 10 years of hands-on experience in this specific product, I would like to clarify:

Is the SAP Learning Subscription mandatory to renew this certification?

If so, are there alternative pathways for experienced professionals to extend certification validity without this subscription?

The current cost of the SAP LH subscription (₹1.12 lakh INR) for an individual contributor, especially as it exceeds the certification fee by nearly fourfold. Also, SAP LH does not appear to be available for individual purchase, creating a significant barrier for freelancers like myself.

I have recently completed two additional certifications (details available upon request) and remain committed to maintaining my credentials. Could you advise if there are:

Exemptions for professionals with extensive experience?

Alternative assessments or renewal options without SAP LH?

Any upcoming programs for individual/affordable renewal pathways?

Your guidance would help me retain my certification and continue contributing to the SAP ecosystem.

Certificate Details:
https://www.credly.com/badges/99100aa7-dc1f-4d08-8aff-55397bfb6c43/public_url

Thank you for your time and support.
Best regards,
Sankaran A

entry.title: Where to see all badges earned? I can see my certificates here https://learning.sap.com/my-learning
entry.content:
Where to see all badges earned? I can see my certificates here https://learning.sap.com/my-learning

but not badges, I can see those are still verifiable on credly but i want to see on sap website
